ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., aeromagnetic, electromagnetic) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "common_formats" TEXT /* Common formats supported by the dataset */,
  "all_formats" TEXT /* All formats supported by the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_formats" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_format_metadata" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset-data format pair was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset-data format pair was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset-data format pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user for the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "user_id")
)
